name: Puppet
description: Puppet — CI/CD for Applications tool for developers. Specializes in Configuration Management.

seo.title: Puppet Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Puppet analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CI/CD for Applications.

review.verdict: Puppet is a CDN / Edge / Acceleration tool.
pros: Global edge network delivers low-latency content
cons: Proprietary edge functions create platform dependency
review.not_for: Apps serving a single geographic region
